headline: Expeditors Expands Global Aircraft on Ground Services Amid Rising Demand for Time-Critical Aviation and Aerospace Logistics
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., July 20, 2026--Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. (NYSE:EXPD) today announced the expansion of its global Aircraft on Ground (AOG) capabilities, bringing together dedicated critical logistics teams, 24/7/365 support centers, and access to the company’s global network to support aviation and aerospace customers facing urgent operational disruptions.
